particulars.description: Fixed and floating charge over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, uncalled capital, buildings, fixtures, fixed plant & machinery.

particulars.description: The receivables meaning the debts and the payment instruments and all money in respect of the debts and/or the payment instruments together with all rights benefits interest insurance monies or proceeds all drafts undertakings or guarantees see image for full details.
